name: Cereal Killer Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dark brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a small bowl, mix the oats with the brickle chips.
3. Sift together the all-purpose flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in another bowl.
4. In a food processor, blend the sugars until smooth, then gradually add the butter.
5. Process until creamy and smooth.
6. Add the eggs and vanilla extract to the food processor, processing until well combined.
7. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture to the food processor, processing just until combined.
8. Using a 2-tablespoon measure, scoop portions of dough onto greased cookie sheets, spacing them at least 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks before serving.
